title: callicarpa giraldii var. lyi
intro: Callicarpa giraldii var. lyi, also known as the purple fruit callicarpa, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and fruit, which are used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Callicarpa giraldii var. lyi include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Callicarpa giraldii var. lyi is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being.
